Package de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

package de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

  • Class
    Description
    AbstractPropertiesSettings
    A base class for own settings based on properties.
    AbstractPropertiesSettings.PropertyEntry<T>
     
    AbstractSettings
     
    ChoiceSettings
     
    Configuration
    A container to hold parsed configurations.
    Configuration.ConfigurationMeta
    POJO for metadata of configuration entries.
    Configuration.ConfigurationWriter
    Writer for configurations.
    DefaultSMTSettings
    The default implementation of SMTSettings.
    FeatureSettings
    Feature flags for the selected and deselected of experimental features.
    FeatureSettings.Feature
     
    GeneralSettings
     
    LemmaGeneratorSettings
     
    NewSMTTranslationSettings
    A collection of settings for the new (= 2021) SMT translation.
    PathConfig
    Keeps some central paths to files and directories.
    ProofDependentSMTSettings
     
    ProofIndependentSettings
    Top of the proof independent settings.
    ProofIndependentSMTSettings
     
    ProofIndependentSMTSettings.ProgressMode
     
    ProofSettings
    This class is used to load and save settings for proofs such as which data type models are used to represent the java types.
    Settings
    This interface is implemented by classes that are used to store settings for different proposes (like active heuristics, which LDTs to use etc.)
    SettingsConverter
    Utility class providing various methods to read properties.
    StrategySettings
     
    TermLabelSettings
    Proof-dependent settings for TermLabels.
    ViewSettings
    This class encapsulates information about: 1) relative font size in the prover view 2) the maximal number of lines a tooltip with instantiated SchemaVariables is allowed to have.
